## Pick #1 — Score: 8/10

**NBA Rescinds Mitchell Robinson's Technical Foul from Finals Game 2**
*Google News - NBA*
[Read the full article →](https://news.google.?oc=5)
**Live Pick:** true

**Why it matters:**
The NBA walking back a technical foul in the middle of the Finals is a rare admission that officiating got it wrong on the biggest stage — and it matters because Robinson, already a polarizing physical presence, was caught in a shoving match that the league now says didn't warrant the call. It won't change the Game 2 result, but it does shift the narrative around how refs are policing the Knicks' center during a championship run. For New York fans who've spent years feeling victimized by officiating, this rescission is both vindication and fuel.

**Hook:**
The NBA just admitted they blew a tech call on Mitchell Robinson in the Finals — too late to matter for the scoreboard, but not too late to matter for the story.
